title: That Certain Thing
writer: Elmer Harris, Frank Capra, Al Boasberg
actors: Viola Dana, Ralph Graves, Burr McIntosh
plot: Molly Kelly wants to marry a millionaire. When she runs into Andy Charles, heir to a restaurant fortune, she jumps at the chance and marries him. Andy's father if furious and disinherits them. Andy tries his hand at ditch digging ...
